hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git add (-A|\.)($| )'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use selective git add with specific files, not git add -A or git add . (per CLAUDE.md Commit Protocol)' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '/venv/'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not modify files in venv/ — use pip install instead' >&2; exit 2; fi
